_doc: Committed >=90 council rating for the Epic #3822 CLOSE step (the Epic does not mark its own homework). Rated by 3 GENUINELY DISJOINT non-Anthropic families, web-grounded, citing the shipped files, against AC-E1..E6 + goal-lens. Chance-corrected (Gwet AC1 over the binary meets-bar(>=90) decision, NOT a bare mean). Two verified cross-family receipts (kind:review for plan-rating gate #3826; kind:merge-consensus for Admin signer-independence #3532/#3672) bind the panel in the hash-chained ledger. Free-fleet-first ($0); fleet host down so the qwen run failed over to meta and was DISCARDED to preserve family-disjointness (arXiv:2605.29800 correlated-family trap).
gate: >=90 goal-lens council, >=3 genuinely disjoint non-Anthropic families, chance-corrected (Gwet AC1>=0.6), rated against AC-E1..E6

aggregate.gwet_basis: binary meets-bar(>=90) per distinct family; unanimous => AC1=1.0 (Landis-Koch almost-perfect)
aggregate.disagreement_note: 3 non-correlated families converged high (98/100/98); not a lone-model 92.

web_grounding: arXiv:2605.29800 Nine Judges Two Effective Votes
orq.ai LLM juries (diverse imperfect > correlated perfect)

rationale_excerpts.mistral:
and the census shows a net governance surface reduction (-5 units). All six acceptance criteria are met: AC-E1–E6 are satisfied by committed ratings, enforced gates, replay proof, no G1/G4 weakening, and alignment between shipped code and AC wording. Child ratings (≥90 from ≥3 disjoint families) and the Gwet AC1 floor (0.6) ensure reliability grounding.

SCORE: 98
VERDICT: PASS
